description_long: This is a full-sized acoustic guitar with a natural wood finish on the front soundboard and a darker wood color on the sides and back. The body is a classic dreadnought shape, featuring a black pickguard, a round sound hole with a simple rosette, and a bridge with six white bridge pins. The neck is long and slender, topped with a headstock that has three tuning pegs on each side, and the fretboard is marked with dot inlays. The back and sides are a deep, rich brown, contrasting with the lighter top. The overall construction suggests a traditional steel-string acoustic guitar, commonly used for a variety of musical genres in urban settings.
description: A classic dreadnought acoustic guitar with a natural wood top, dark brown back and sides, and a black pickguard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the light wood soundboard, black pickguard, round sound hole, bridge, and full fretboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's depth, curved body profile, and the transition from the light top to the dark sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark brown back, neck, and headstock, with no visible hardware or pickguard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same depth and body contour as the other side, with the dark finish prominent.
attribute_headstock_design: Standard acoustic headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, and a simple rectangular shape.
